mapper.select: SELECT m.permission_code FROM sys_user_role ur INNER JOIN sys_role r ON r.id = ur.role_id AND enabled = 1 AND deleted = 0 INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON rm.role_id = r.id INNER JOIN sys_menu m ON m.id = rm.menu_id AND m.enabled = 1 AND m.deleted = 0 WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.permission_code IS NOT NULL AND m.permission_code != ''
